listings.name: AEON Clinic
listings.description: Specializing in stem cell therapy, hyperbaric oxygen therapy, NAD+ infusions, and advanced anti-aging treatments inside Atlantis The Royal.

listings.name: Clinique La Prairie — Longevity Hub
listings.description: A 3,800 sqm longevity center with 29 treatment rooms, a Longevity Index diagnostic lounge, and programs combining preventive medicine with regenerative care.

listings.name: Bioscience Institute
listings.tagline: Precision medicine at the molecular level
listings.description: Offering stem cell therapy, AGESKILL IV treatments, and molecular-level biological age monitoring with personalized longevity strategies.

listings.name: Formation
listings.description: Cryotherapy, PEMF therapy, VO2 testing, infrared sauna, red light therapy, and adaptive AI-driven training — all focused on energy, recovery, and longevity.

listings.name: Aviv Clinics
listings.tagline: World's largest hyperbaric oxygen therapy center
listings.description: A 7,000 sqm facility integrating HBOT with cognitive assessments, physical conditioning, and lifestyle guidance. First UHMS-accredited facility in the Middle East.

listings.name: UCRYO Wellness Center
listings.description: Whole-body cryotherapy, localized cryotherapy, infrared sauna, compression therapy, and IV vitamin drips across multiple Dubai locations.

listings.name: Illuminations Well-Being Center
listings.description: Reiki, Theta healing, Chakra healing, sound healing, breathwork, guided meditation, life coaching, hypnotherapy, and corporate wellness programs.

listings.name: Home of Wellness
listings.tagline: A sanctuary for sound healing & breathwork
listings.description: Sound healing, breathwork, reiki, hypnotherapy, guided meditation, and energy healing for individuals, groups, and corporates.

listings.name: The Healers' Clinic
listings.description: Blending Ayurveda, homeopathy, naturopathy, yoga, and modern medicine. Over 15,000 patients served since 2016.

listings.name: House of Nature Medical Center
listings.description: Ayurveda, yoga, chiropractic care, naturopathy, functional medicine, acupuncture, and traditional healing therapies.

listings.name: Karma Yoga Dubai
listings.description: Hatha, Vinyasa, Ashtanga, Kundalini, and Yin yoga with meditation workshops and energy healing — offering stunning marina views and a vibrant community.

listings.name: The Chi Room
listings.tagline: Boutique studio in Dubai's creative arts district
listings.description: Yoga, breathwork, sound healing, and meditation in an intimate, community-driven setting that bridges movement with mindfulness.

listings.name: The Retreat Palm Dubai
listings.description: Home to the world's first Rayya Wellness Centre offering 360-degree holistic wellness. Alcohol-free with clean-food dining built on Feng Shui principles.

listings.name: ZOYA Health & Wellbeing Resort
listings.description: A 1,500 sqm holistic spa with nine structured retreat programs — detox, rejuvenation, anti-aging, immune support — plus hydrotherapy, infrared sauna, and therapeutic fasting.

listings.name: DNA Health & Wellness
listings.description: Personalized health programs based on genetic testing, epigenetic analysis, and biomarker optimization. Offers IV therapy, hormone balancing, and anti-aging protocols.

listings.name: Skin111 Clinic
listings.description: Regenerative medicine, PRP therapy, exosome treatments, and advanced anti-aging protocols. Winner of multiple Middle East beauty and wellness awards.

listings.name: Advanced Health Dubai
listings.description: Comprehensive functional medicine assessments, gut health diagnostics, heavy metal detox, telomere testing, and personalized longevity roadmaps.

listings.name: EDEN AESTHETICS Clinic
listings.description: German-certified medical team offering stem cell therapy, exosome treatments, NAD+ infusions, and bio-identical hormone optimization.

listings.name: Wellth by Medcare
listings.description: IV therapy, cryotherapy, hyperbaric oxygen, compression therapy, and infrared sauna — all under medical supervision at a premium healthcare facility.

listings.name: RESYNC
listings.description: Combining sports science with recovery tech — NormaTec compression, Game Ready cold therapy, EMS training, and metabolic testing for peak performance.

listings.name: The Brain & Performance Centre
listings.description: Neurofeedback, brain mapping (qEEG), transcranial stimulation, and cognitive performance programs for focus, stress, sleep, and mental clarity.

listings.name: CRYO
listings.description: Full-body and localized cryotherapy, CryoFacials, infrared sauna, and compression therapy. One of the first dedicated cryo studios in the UAE.

listings.name: Santhigiri Holistic Health Center
listings.description: Authentic Panchakarma, Siddha treatments, yoga therapy, and Ayurvedic consultations led by practitioners from the renowned Santhigiri Ashram in Kerala.

listings.name: Dubai Herbal & Treatment Centre
listings.description: One of Dubai's first licensed herbal medicine centers. Offering naturopathy, homeopathy, herbal medicine, hijama (cupping), and acupuncture.

listings.name: Keyani Wellness
listings.description: Reiki master sessions, crystal healing, chakra balancing, emotional freedom technique (EFT), and one-on-one holistic life coaching.

listings.name: Sohum Wellness Sanctuary
listings.tagline: Mind-body healing in a serene sanctuary
listings.description: Sound baths, guided meditation, breathwork circles, Reiki, and therapeutic yoga in a purpose-built healing space designed for deep restoration.

listings.name: Bodytree Studio
listings.tagline: Abu Dhabi's premier yoga & Pilates studio
listings.description: Yoga, Pilates, barre, and movement classes in a beautiful, community-focused studio. Also offers teacher training, workshops, and wellness events.

listings.name: Aura Wellness
listings.description: Vinyasa, Hatha, Yin yoga, and meditation with a focus on mindfulness and self-care. Offers private sessions, corporate programs, and outdoor events.

listings.name: Dhyana Dubai
listings.description: Hot yoga, infrared-heated classes, cold plunge recovery, and sound healing in a state-of-the-art studio with heated and non-heated rooms.

listings.name: Seven Wellness
listings.description: A multi-discipline studio offering yoga, functional fitness, Pilates, and breathwork in an intimate, community-driven setting.

listings.name: Talise Ottoman Spa
listings.tagline: World-class spa inside Jumeirah Zabeel Saray
listings.description: One of the largest spas in the Middle East with Turkish hammam, snow room, salt room, thalassotherapy pool, and over 40 signature treatments.

listings.name: Anantara Spa at Qasr Al Sarab
listings.tagline: Desert wellness in the Empty Quarter
listings.description: A luxury desert resort spa offering Arabian-inspired treatments, desert meditation, sunrise yoga, and wellness retreats surrounded by the dunes of Liwa.

listings.name: Heart & Soul Spa
listings.tagline: Boutique wellness spa with healing focus
listings.description: A boutique spa combining massage therapy, aromatherapy, reflexology, and energy healing with personalized wellness consultations.

listings.name: Plume Studio
listings.description: Float therapy, infrared sauna, cold plunge, compression therapy, and guided relaxation in a modern wellness lounge designed for urban recovery.

listings.name: Kintsugi Space
listings.description: Abu Dhabi's first women-only holistic wellness members' club offering infrared saunas, obsidian crystal sauna, hammam, onsen bath, sound healing, meditation, and biohacking therapies in a luxurious private setting.

listings.name: Ayura Ayurveda
listings.description: One of Abu Dhabi's leading Ayurvedic healthcare centers with 13+ years of experience, offering 100% natural Ayurvedic treatments, rejuvenation programs, herbal medicines, and ancient wellness therapies guided by experienced Ayurvedic doctors.

listings.name: Antara Yoga & Pilates
listings.tagline: Abu Dhabi's home for heated yoga
listings.description: A dedicated heated and non-heated yoga and Pilates studio specializing in hot vinyasa, Bikram-style hot yoga, hot Pilates, and sculpt classes taught by certified instructors in a studio heated to 40 degrees Celsius.

listings.name: YogaOne
listings.description: A yoga and wellness studio with two locations in Abu Dhabi offering an extensive class schedule including aerial yoga, swing yoga, sound healing, reformer Pilates, and corporate wellness programs.

listings.name: Soul & Skin Wellness
listings.description: A collective wellness hub at the Park Hyatt Hotel on Saadiyat Beach offering yoga, Pilates, reformer Pilates, group fitness, personal training, sound healing, and meditation in a stunning beachside setting.

listings.name: The Spa at Mandarin Oriental, Emirates Palace
listings.description: An award-winning luxury spa within Emirates Palace featuring nine private treatment suites, a Royal Hammam, Moroccan-inspired rituals, contrast therapy, breathwork, and treatments using premium brands like OTO CBD and Tata Harper.

listings.name: Anantara Spa at Eastern Mangroves
listings.description: An award-winning urban waterfront spa featuring 15 treatment suites, a traditional Turkish hammam, VIP hammam scrub rooms with Vichy showers, couples suites, and signature eastern healing treatments with Arabic influences.

listings.name: REVIVE Abu Dhabi
listings.description: A wellness and recovery center combining professional body massage, cryotherapy, ice baths, infrared sauna, cupping therapy, and sports recovery in one facility focused on pain relief, athletic recovery, and long-lasting wellness.

listings.name: Barakah Studio
listings.description: Sharjah's leading ladies-only yoga and Pilates studio founded by two local sisters, offering reformer Pilates, multiple yoga styles, sound healing, and meditation in a safe, supportive space designed for women's wellbeing.

listings.name: Sujana Power Yoga
listings.tagline: Therapeutic yoga with nine years of practice
listings.description: A yoga center in Sharjah with 9+ years of experience offering therapeutic yoga classes, pranayama, meditation, and specialized programs for health conditions like back pain, blood pressure, and stress management.

listings.name: Dar Pilates
listings.tagline: Women's Pilates & yoga born in Sharjah
listings.description: A women-only reformer Pilates and yoga studio in Sharjah, founded by local sisters, offering small-group classes with certified instructors, private sessions, and cycle-based yoga designed to help women move, breathe, and glow.

listings.name: The Chedi Al Bait Spa
listings.tagline: Luxury heritage spa in Sharjah's heart
listings.description: A luxury 500 sqm spa within the five-star Chedi Al Bait hotel in Sharjah's Heart of Sharjah heritage district, offering signature massages, Turkish-style foot reflexology, prickly pear oil facials, rose body envelopments, and therapeutic whirl baths.

listings.name: AWAKEN Wellness at Atlantis The Royal
listings.tagline: Holistic luxury wellness at Atlantis The Royal
listings.description: An all-suites luxury spa and wellness destination within Atlantis The Royal featuring 15 therapy suites, a hammam sensorium, outdoor meditation pavilion, aesthetic wellness clinic, and treatments using clean, vegan, locally-sourced ingredients.

listings.name: Guerlain Spa at One&Only The Palm
listings.tagline: The Middle East's only Guerlain Spa
listings.description: The only Guerlain Spa in the Middle East, spanning 2,400 sqm within a Moorish palace-inspired setting at One&Only The Palm, featuring 9 treatment suites, an adults-only pool, hammam, and premium Guerlain skincare treatments.
listings.location: One&Only The Palm, West Crescent, Palm Jumeirah

listings.name: MOUV Pilates Studio
listings.tagline: UAE's first hybrid reformer Pilates studio
listings.description: The UAE's first hybrid reformer Pilates studio offering both instructor-led and on-demand reformer classes, giving clients the flexibility of self-paced workouts alongside expert-guided sessions in a modern studio.

listings.name: Kora Longevity Center
listings.description: A boutique longevity clinic offering personalized protocols including NAD+ IV therapy, peptide therapy, ozone therapy, advanced blood panels, and epigenetic age testing — popular with the Dubai biohacking community.

listings.name: Dr Ozone Clinic
listings.description: A specialist clinic focused on medical ozone therapy, offering 10-pass ozone, rectal insufflation, ozone sauna, and IV ozone protocols for detox, immune support, and chronic health conditions.

listings.name: ZOIME Longevity Centre
listings.description: A comprehensive longevity center offering full-body MRI screening, biological age testing, VO2 max testing, DEXA scans, CGM monitoring, and personalized longevity protocols backed by advanced diagnostics.

listings.name: Pura Longevity Clinic
listings.description: A longevity-focused clinic offering hormone optimization, advanced blood biomarker panels, peptide protocols, IV nutrient therapy, and personalized anti-aging programs designed for peak health and performance.

listings.name: Biohackn
listings.description: A biohacking and wellness center offering red light therapy, PEMF, cold plunge, infrared sauna, IV drips, and group biohacking sessions — a hub for Dubai's growing biohacking community.

listings.name: Recovery On Demand
listings.tagline: Mobile recovery & wellness to your door
listings.description: A mobile recovery service bringing cryotherapy, compression therapy, IV drips, and sports recovery treatments directly to homes, offices, and events across Dubai.

listings.name: Bliss Now Recovery
listings.tagline: Urban recovery lounge for mind & body
listings.description: A recovery-focused wellness lounge offering float tanks, cold plunge, infrared sauna, compression therapy, and guided breathwork — designed for post-workout recovery and stress relief.

listings.name: OS-1 Fitness
listings.description: A functional fitness studio integrating strength training with longevity-focused protocols including zone 2 cardio, VO2 max training, mobility work, and metabolic conditioning — popular with Dubai's biohacking community.

listings.name: YOFIT Hot Studios
listings.description: A hot yoga and fitness studio using infrared heating technology for hot yoga, hot Pilates, hot HIIT, and recovery sessions — designed to enhance detoxification, flexibility, and calorie burn.

listings.name: Forus Life
listings.description: A health-tech platform offering at-home blood testing, hormone panels, gut health tests, food sensitivity testing, and functional medicine consultations — making advanced diagnostics accessible from home.

listings.name: Valeo
listings.description: A health-tech service providing at-home blood draws, comprehensive biomarker panels, and AI-powered health analytics — delivering lab-quality results with personalized health insights directly to your phone.

listings.name: Rejuv
listings.description: An IV therapy and wellness clinic offering NAD+ drips, vitamin infusions, glutathione, hydration therapy, and custom wellness protocols — with in-clinic and at-home service options.

listings.name: She Is Liberty
listings.description: A women-focused wellness platform offering hormone health coaching, menopause support, cycle syncing guidance, functional nutrition, and community workshops — empowering women to optimize their health at every life stage.

listings.name: Everwell
listings.description: A preventive health clinic offering comprehensive health screenings, genetic testing, personalized supplement protocols, functional medicine consultations, and corporate wellness programs.

listings.name: Broth Lab
listings.description: A specialty kitchen producing slow-simmered bone broths from grass-fed, organic sources — available in classic beef, chicken, and turmeric varieties. Popular for gut health, fasting protocols, and post-workout recovery.

listings.name: Hola Zero Sugar Cafe
listings.description: A health-conscious cafe serving entirely sugar-free meals, snacks, and beverages — popular with keto, diabetic-friendly, and longevity-minded communities. Offerings include keto desserts, protein bowls, and adaptogenic drinks.

listings.name: ME Kombucha
listings.description: A local artisan kombucha brand brewing small-batch, raw, probiotic-rich kombucha in unique flavors. Available at health food stores, farmers markets, and via home delivery across the UAE.

listings.name: Generation H
listings.description: A health food concept store and community kitchen offering organic produce, functional foods, wellness supplements, fresh cold-pressed juices, and educational wellness workshops.

listings.name: Scoop Wholefoods
listings.description: A zero-waste, bulk health food store offering organic superfoods, nuts, seeds, adaptogens, protein powders, and eco-friendly household products — a go-to for the health-conscious community in Dubai.

listings.name: Reset Villa
listings.description: A private villa-style wellness retreat offering cold plunge, infrared sauna, IV therapy, breathwork sessions, and guided detox programs in an intimate, residential setting away from the clinical environment.

listings.name: Contrast Wellness
listings.description: Private Finnish sauna suites paired with glacier-cold ice bath plunges, enhanced with red light therapy and NormaTec compression. Four locations across Dubai.
listings.location: Dubai Creek Harbour, City Walk, JVC, Palm Jumeirah

listings.name: Novomed Centers
listings.description: Leading healthcare group offering functional medicine, biohacking protocols, healthy aging programs, and integrative health across multiple UAE locations.

listings.name: Wellth Clinic
listings.description: A holistic medical centre combining Ayurveda, Chinese medicine, chiropractic, functional medicine, physiotherapy, yoga, and Pilates under one roof.

listings.name: Biolite Healthness
listings.description: A regenerative medicine and holistic healthcare center combining advanced diagnostics, anti-aging treatments, and restorative wellness in a resort-like day retreat setting.

listings.name: Limitless Human
listings.description: Advanced diagnostics, biohacking protocols, and longevity science for peak human performance. Personalized optimization plans based on cutting-edge biomarker testing.

listings.name: The Hundred Wellness Centre
listings.description: Founded by Emirati Asma Hilal Lootah, one of Dubai's original wellness destinations offering Pilates, yoga, physiotherapy, nutrition, and holistic health under one roof.

listings.name: Just Padel
listings.description: Just Padel operates multiple padel courts across Dubai at Kite Beach, Mina Rashid, and Dubai South. Ideal for beginners and seasoned players with flexible booking, coaching programs, and social leagues.
listings.location: Kite Beach, Mina Rashid & Dubai South

listings.name: Central Padel
listings.description: Central Padel is internationally recognised for its professional coaching and competitive play. Indoor and outdoor courts, regular tournaments, and structured training programs for all levels.

listings.name: Redline Padel Club
listings.description: Redline Padel Club stands out as one of Dubai's most lifestyle-driven padel destinations with consistent court conditions, professional coaching staff, an active tournament calendar, and vibrant social atmosphere.

listings.name: Matcha Club
listings.tagline: Padel, yoga, and café culture in Al Quoz
listings.description: Matcha Club in Al Quoz features six outdoor padel courts alongside yoga studios for post-game stretching and a Nette café serving Japanese-European breakfast. A unique wellness-meets-sport experience.

listings.name: Club Padel
listings.tagline: Indoor and outdoor padel courts across Dubai
listings.description: Club Padel offers premium indoor and outdoor padel courts with flexible booking, group sessions, and competitive leagues. A go-to venue for the growing Dubai padel community.

listings.name: Padel Edition
listings.description: Padel Edition is a dedicated indoor padel facility in Dubai offering climate-controlled courts year-round, perfect for summer play. Professional coaching and league play available.

listings.name: RRA Padel Academy
listings.tagline: Padel with Burj Khalifa views at Dusit Thani
listings.description: RRA Padel Academy at Dusit Thani Dubai provides padel with a view — courts boasting Instagram-worthy backdrops of the Burj Khalifa in DIFC. Professional coaching and social play.

listings.name: NAS Sports Complex
listings.tagline: Multi-sport complex with padel and more
listings.description: NAS Sports Complex in Al Quoz is a multi-sport venue featuring padel courts alongside football pitches, swimming pools, and fitness facilities. One of Dubai's most established sports destinations.

listings.name: Dutch Padel Club
listings.description: Dutch Padel Club in Dubai Sports City is known for its coaching programs and social padel community. Group lessons, private coaching, and regular social play sessions.

listings.name: Just Pickle
listings.description: Just Pickle by the Just Padel team brings dedicated pickleball courts to Dubai — the fastest-growing sport in the world. Beginner-friendly with coaching, open play, and competitive leagues.

listings.name: Embody Fitness
listings.tagline: Dubai's most exclusive personal training studio
listings.description: Embody Fitness in DIFC caps membership at 250 for an ultra-private experience. Bespoke 8-12 week transformation programs, recovery suites with ice baths, saunas, and sports massage. Five-star spa aesthetics.

listings.name: The Warehouse Gym
listings.description: The Warehouse Gym's flagship Al Quoz location is a Dubai fitness institution. Raw industrial aesthetic, serious lifting equipment, CrossFit, boxing ring, spin studio, juice bar, and ladies-only spaces across multiple locations.

listings.name: Viya Fit
listings.tagline: Luxury gym with rooftop padel in Dubai Marina
listings.description: Viya Fit in Dubai Marina delivers a luxury gym experience with reformer Pilates studios, rooftop padel courts, outdoor running tracks, and state-of-the-art changing rooms catering to both performance and comfort.

listings.name: Wellfit
listings.tagline: Multi-functional lifestyle gym with climbing wall
listings.description: Wellfit in Al Quoz is a multi-functional lifestyle gym featuring strength zones, CrossFit-style training, recovery suites, indoor cycling, and even climbing walls. Family-friendly with diverse programming.

listings.name: GymNation
listings.tagline: Affordable mega gyms with 24/7 access across Dubai
listings.description: GymNation is the UAE's largest gym chain with 10+ locations offering massive floor space, functional fitness zones, Hyrox training areas, group classes, and 24/7 access at affordable prices.

listings.name: Barry's
listings.tagline: The best workout in the world — HIIT in the Red Room
listings.description: Barry's brings its globally iconic Red Room to Dubai with locations in DIFC and Dubai Marina. High-intensity interval training combining treadmill cardio and floor strength work in an electrifying atmosphere.

listings.name: F45 Training
listings.description: F45 Training brings functional 45-minute team workouts to multiple Dubai locations. Circuit-based HIIT with a different workout every day, technology-driven screens, and a strong global community.

listings.name: Crank
listings.tagline: Homegrown Dubai HIIT and cycling studio
listings.description: Crank is a homegrown Dubai brand offering high-intensity group classes across multiple locations. TRX, battle ropes, sleds, and functional movements. Known for tough workouts and a strong community.
listings.location: Business Bay, JLT, Dubai Hills & more

listings.name: Core Direction
listings.description: Core Direction is a premium reformer Pilates studio in Dubai offering small-group classes focusing on core strength, flexibility, and posture. Expert instructors and a boutique atmosphere.

listings.name: Club Pilates
listings.tagline: Global reformer Pilates franchise in Dubai
listings.description: Club Pilates brings its world-renowned reformer-based classes to Dubai at City Walk and Dubai Hills. Four levels from intro to advanced, TRX integration, and experienced instructors.

listings.name: BARE
listings.tagline: Outdoor beach fitness and calisthenics at Kite Beach
listings.description: BARE runs outdoor bootcamps and calisthenics sessions on Kite Beach at sunrise. Bodyweight training, functional fitness, and community-driven beach workouts under the Dubai sky.

listings.name: Vogue Fitness
listings.tagline: Premier CrossFit and functional fitness facility
listings.description: Vogue Fitness is a premium CrossFit and functional fitness facility hosting regional competitions. Huge space, top-tier coaching, Olympic lifting platforms, and dedicated Hyrox training areas.

listings.name: CrossFit Gold Box
listings.tagline: One of Dubai's original and most popular CrossFit boxes
listings.description: CrossFit Gold Box in Al Quoz is one of the original and most popular CrossFit boxes in Dubai. Strong community, experienced coaches, competition team, and specialty programs in Olympic lifting and gymnastics.

listings.name: TribeFit
listings.tagline: CrossFit gym meets social hub in JLT
listings.description: TribeFit in JLT combines CrossFit and functional fitness with a social hub featuring a rooftop pool. A community-driven gym where fitness meets Dubai lifestyle.

listings.name: FitRepublik
listings.description: FitRepublik in Dubai Sports City is one of the largest fitness facilities in the region at over 100,000 sq ft. Olympic pool, climbing wall, indoor track, CrossFit area, spin studio, and padel court.

listings.name: Flywheel Sports
listings.description: Flywheel Sports in DIFC offers performance-based indoor cycling with real-time metrics and a Torqboard leaderboard for competitive riders. Premium boutique cycling experience.

listings.name: Fortius
listings.description: Fortius is a performance-focused CrossFit and strength training gym in Dubai. Competitive programming, experienced coaching, and a community of serious athletes.

listings.name: UFC Gym
listings.tagline: Official UFC-branded MMA and fitness across Dubai
listings.description: UFC Gym operates 5+ branches across Dubai including One Central, JBR, and Mirdif. Full MMA offering with boxing, kickboxing, BJJ, and HIIT classes alongside premium gym facilities.

listings.name: Round 10 Boxing Club
listings.tagline: Authentic boxing gym with competition focus
listings.description: Round 10 Boxing Club in Dubai's D3 Design District is a dedicated boxing gym with a strong community following. Technical boxing training for all levels with a gritty, authentic atmosphere.

listings.name: Team Nogueira Dubai
listings.tagline: World-class BJJ and MMA by UFC legend
listings.description: Founded by UFC legend Rodrigo 'Minotauro' Nogueira, Team Nogueira Dubai offers world-class MMA and Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu training at JLT and Al Quoz. Gi and no-gi BJJ, MMA, and striking classes.

listings.name: TK MMA & Fitness
listings.tagline: Pioneer of MMA in the UAE
listings.description: TK MMA & Fitness, owned by Tam Khan — the pioneer of MMA in the UAE — offers comprehensive combat training including boxing, Muay Thai, BJJ, and MMA in a purpose-built facility.

listings.name: Champions Club
listings.description: Champions Club is headed by three-time world champion Prince Amir. Learn MMA fundamentals including cardio fitness, self-defence, Jiu-Jitsu, boxing, and Muay Thai kickboxing.

listings.name: Cobra Fitness
listings.tagline: Muay Thai and combat sports with Thai trainers
listings.description: Cobra Fitness is a well-established combat sports gym with a strong Muay Thai program led by authentic Thai trainers. Also offering boxing, BJJ, spin, and kids programs. Known for producing competitive fighters.

listings.name: 971 MMA
listings.description: 971 MMA is a professional MMA training facility in Dubai catering to both aspiring fighters and fitness enthusiasts. Expert coaching in mixed martial arts, striking, and grappling.

listings.name: Real Boxing Only (RBO)
listings.tagline: Pure boxing, no frills — Al Quoz
listings.description: Real Boxing Only is a pure boxing gym in Al Quoz used by amateur and professional boxers. An authentic, no-frills training environment focused on technical development and conditioning.

listings.name: Golden Gloves Boxing
listings.tagline: Boxing and kickboxing for all levels
listings.description: Golden Gloves offers boxing and kickboxing training across multiple Dubai locations. Both competitive and fitness-oriented programs with experienced trainers.

listings.name: Palms Sports
listings.tagline: Large fitness chain with dedicated combat zones
listings.description: Palms Sports is a large fitness club chain across Dubai with dedicated combat sports areas including boxing rings and MMA cages. Accessible to beginners with structured group classes.

listings.name: Gracie Jiu-Jitsu Dubai
listings.tagline: Gracie lineage BJJ with structured curriculum
listings.description: Gracie Jiu-Jitsu Dubai brings the legendary Gracie family's structured BJJ curriculum to the UAE. White belt to black belt progression with emphasis on self-defence and sport Jiu-Jitsu.

listings.name: SeaYou Watersports
listings.tagline: Dubai's top operator for kayaking, SUP, and open water swimming
listings.description: SeaYou Watersports offers SUP tours around Palm Jumeirah, kayaking, and open water swim sessions. The most popular operator for non-motorized water sports in Dubai.

listings.name: Nalu Watersports
listings.tagline: SUP, kayaking, and surf lessons at multiple beaches
listings.description: Nalu Watersports offers SUP lessons and rentals, kayak tours, and surf lessons across La Mer, JBR, and Palm Jumeirah. A well-established operator with multiple beach locations.

listings.name: Kite N Surf
listings.description: Kite N Surf at Kite Beach offers IKO-certified kitesurfing lessons, surfing, and SUP. Located at Dubai's dedicated kitesurfing zone with ideal wind conditions.

listings.name: Surf House Dubai
listings.tagline: Dubai's surfing community hub near Burj Al Arab
listings.description: Surf House Dubai at Sunset Beach is a community hub for the Dubai surfing scene. Surf lessons, SUP sessions, and a laid-back beach culture near the Burj Al Arab.

listings.name: WeSUP
listings.description: WeSUP offers wellness-oriented paddleboarding at Palm Jumeirah — SUP yoga sessions, sunrise and sunset paddle tours, and SUP fitness classes combining wellness with water sports.

listings.name: Al Boom Diving
listings.description: Al Boom Diving is one of the longest-running dive operators in the UAE offering PADI courses, dive trips to Fujairah and Musandam, and snorkeling excursions. Full gear rental and certification programs.

listings.name: Hatta Kayak
listings.tagline: Kayaking at Hatta Dam with mountain views
listings.description: Hatta Kayak offers kayaking and pedal boating on the stunning Hatta Dam. Part of the Hatta adventure hub which includes mountain biking trails, hiking, and a zipline.

listings.name: Dubai Creek Striders
listings.tagline: Dubai's oldest and largest running club
listings.description: Dubai Creek Striders is one of the oldest and largest running clubs in Dubai. Weekly runs, race training programs, social events, and all levels welcome. Part of the UAE athletics community.

listings.name: Midnight Runners Dubai
listings.tagline: Free social running crew — music, community, nightlife
listings.description: Midnight Runners Dubai is a free social running crew meeting across Downtown, DIFC, and JLT. Evening runs followed by socializing — music-driven, themed events, and a global brand with a strong Dubai chapter.

listings.name: Cycle Hub Dubai
listings.tagline: Base camp for the 86km Al Qudra cycle track
listings.description: Cycle Hub Dubai is the base for rides on the Al Qudra cycle track — an 86km dedicated cycling track in the desert. Bike rentals, servicing, and regular group rides for all levels.

listings.name: Wolfi's Bike Shop
listings.tagline: Dubai's cycling community hub in Al Quoz
listings.description: Wolfi's Bike Shop in Al Quoz is one of Dubai's most well-known cycling shops with an attached riding community. Group rides, bike fitting, servicing, and the heart of the Dubai cycling scene.

listings.name: CLYMB Abu Dhabi
listings.tagline: World's tallest indoor climbing wall at 43 metres
listings.description: CLYMB Abu Dhabi on Yas Island features the world's tallest indoor climbing wall at 43 metres and the world's widest indoor skydiving chamber. Climbing routes for all skill levels.

listings.name: El Camaleon Climbing
listings.description: El Camaleon Climbing in Al Quoz is one of the first dedicated bouldering and climbing gyms in Dubai. Multiple walls with different grades, regular competitions, and a passionate community.

listings.name: Rock Republic
listings.tagline: Modern bouldering gym with regularly reset routes
listings.description: Rock Republic in Al Quoz is a modern bouldering gym with regularly reset routes, youth programs, coaching, and community events. Popular with both beginners and experienced climbers.

listings.name: UAE Trekkers
listings.tagline: Largest hiking community in the UAE
listings.description: UAE Trekkers is one of the largest hiking communities in the UAE. Regular weekend hikes from easy to advanced across Hatta, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah, and Musandam. Hundreds of active members.
